CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE - TRIAL COURTS
Off Calendar Sep-19-2006 Off Calendar

Motion To Dismiss Pltfs' Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-29-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Matter comes on for hearing on Defendants' Motion to dismiss as set in Dept. 606.
Appearances: Christina A. Dondero, Esq. for Defendants and moving parties; no appearance for plaintiff.
The matter was argued and submitted. There being no opposition and the Court finding the matter duly noticed, the Court grants defendants' motion to dismiss the first amended complaint. An order so providing was signed in open court.
Judge: John A. Conway; Clerk: Craig Blackstone; Reporter: Janet Pond. (D. 606)
